item.roacw.mars_engine.desc: Putting on this armor, you feel a power emanating from it that you've never felt before, something precise yet violent, like an automaton designed for carnage.
item.roacw.auric_tesla_cuirass.desc: After finding all of the components to forge such a masterpiece, this armor makes you feel unstoppable, as if the entire world will bow to you.
item.roacw.murasama_blade.desc: The Only Thing I Know For Real...
spell.roacw.quick_strike.guide: Slash at your target multiple times, inflicting Disabled and Severed on hit, and heals you for 35% of the damage dealt
spell.roacw.final_rend.guide: Charge up a powerful slash obliterating nearby entities caught within. Inflicts Disabled and Severed on hit, and healing you for all damage dealt.
